chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANO (Constitutional Jurisdiction) C.P.No. D- 612 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection as flag-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.07.2025. Mr. Mazhar Ali Bhutto, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w/ Mr. Abdul Fatah Kalhoro, Deputy Superintendent, Central Prison, & C.F, Larkano on behalf of Respondent No.2. -------------- Statements have been filed by Respondent No.01 and SHO, Police Station Seehar, taken on record. Inspector General of Sindh Prison/ Respondent No.01, has denied to have given access/liberty to Respondent No.4 for making videos/TikToks outside the Jail premises; however, he submits that he was shifted on humanitarian ground and not for security purpose. In view of the statement filed by Respondent No.1, instant petition is hereby disposed of with directions to the Respondent No. 01, to shift the custody of the Respondent No.4, from Central Prison, Karachi to Central Prison, Larkana. Additional Registrar of this Court is directed to ensure compliance. A copy of this Order shall be sent by Fax to Superintendent, Central Prison, Karachi as well as Inspector General, Prisons, Sindh at Karachi for compliance today. J U D G E J U D G E S-Ashfaq.
